title: GovCMS: A Better Way to Start Government Websites
summary: Join us for a webinar discussing test lifecycle integration and how GovCMS helps start government websites without starting from scratch.
author: GovCMS
content:
Discussing test lifecycle integration
GovCMS: A better Way to Start Government Websites (Without Starting From Scratch)

Time: January 22, 2026 - 03:00 PM Eastern Time (US and Canada)
https://drupal4gov.us/webinars

title: Government Industry Summit - Automated WCAG Testing
summary: Collaborative space at DrupalCon 2026 for the government community to connect, share knowledge, and explore accessibility in government.
author: DrupalCon 2026
content:
Discussing Automated WCAG testing:

Government Industry Summit
Monday, 23 March, 9:00–16:00

The Government Summit provides a collaborative space for the community to connect, share knowledge, and explore the role of Drupal in government. Attendees will discover new tools, techniques, and complementary technologies through sessions, discussions, and guided table topics designed to make government work more efficient and effective.

title: Higher Education Industry Summit - Automated WCAG Testing
summary: Connecting university and college professionals at DrupalCon 2026 to share experiences and explore automated accessibility in higher ed.
author: DrupalCon 2026
content:
Discussing Automated WCAG Testing

Higher Education Industry Summit
Monday, 23 March, 9:00–16:00

The Higher Education Summit brings together university and college professionals to connect, share experiences, and explore how Drupal and complementary technologies are shaping higher ed. Attendees will engage with curated sessions led by higher education Drupal experts and participate in guided roundtable conversations.
